name: remove_background
description: Remove the background from an image using Background Remover Studio running locally on the user's machine. The API server must be started first (BackgroundRemoverStudio.exe --api). All processing happens locally — no data is sent to any external server. Returns a base64-encoded PNG with the background removed and transparent areas.

image_base64.description: Base64-encoded image to process. Accepts raw base64 or a data URI prefix (data:image/png;base64,...). Supports JPG, PNG, WebP, BMP, and TIFF.

filename.description: Original filename of the image (used only to name the output). Example: product_photo.jpg

output.description: Output image format: png (default, transparent), webp (transparent), or jpg (white background).

white_threshold.description: Sensitivity for light or white backgrounds (180–255). Higher values remove more pixels near white. Default 225 works well for most images.

edge_cleanup.description: Edge erosion strength (0–8). Use 1–3 to clean up fringe pixels at the border of the cutout. 0 disables erosion (default).

hair_protect.description: Preserve fine hair and fur details. Recommended for portraits and animal photos. Default true.
